title: Turnkey Documents
contentHtml:
S.NO.

DESCRIPTION

MMDTS No.

 

1

Schedule of technical requirement for supply, apply and installment of interiors for Rajdhani rake LHB design (Tejas type)

MMDTS19042

 

2

STR for supply, apply, installation & commissioning of interiors of LHB AC-2Tier coaches for Tejas rake

MMDTS 20035

 

3

STR for supply, apply, installation & commissioning of interiors of LHB AC-First coaches for Tejas rake

MMDTS 20036

4

STR for supply, apply, installation & commissioning of interiors of LHB AC-Hot buffet coaches for Tejas rake

MMDTS 20037

 

5

Technical specification of Supply, Installation and Commissioning of Complete Furnishing of AC-3T Garibrath Coaches on Turnkey basis

MMDTS 21006

6

Technical specification for manufacturing, testing, quality control, inspection and the supply of complete assembled shell of a LHB coach suitable for operation on broad gauge (1676 mm) routes of Indian Railways

MMDTS 23003

 

Disclaimer: The above documents are not specification, these are turnkey contract documents have been shifted from section Mechnical Design Specification on MCF website.
contentMarkdown:
S.NO.

DESCRIPTION

MMDTS No.

1

Schedule of technical requirement for supply, apply and installment of interiors for Rajdhani rake LHB design (Tejas type)

[MMDTS19042](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS_19042_Rev-02.pdf)

2

STR for supply, apply, installation & commissioning of interiors of LHB AC-2Tier coaches for Tejas rake

[MMDTS 20035](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS_20035_Tejas_AC_2_Tier_Class\(1\).pdf)

3

STR for supply, apply, installation & commissioning of interiors of LHB AC-First coaches for Tejas rake

[MMDTS 20036](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS_20036_Tejas-AC_First_Class\(1\).pdf)

4

STR for supply, apply, installation & commissioning of interiors of LHB AC-Hot buffet coaches for Tejas rake

[MMDTS 20037](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS_20037_Tejas-Hot_Buffet\(1\).pdf)

5

Technical specification of Supply, Installation and Commissioning of Complete Furnishing of AC-3T Garibrath Coaches on Turnkey basis

[MMDTS 21006](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS%20%2021006%20%20Rev_03\(1\).pdf)

6

Technical specification for manufacturing, testing, quality control, inspection and the supply of complete assembled shell of a LHB coach suitable for operation on broad gauge (1676 mm) routes of Indian Railways

[MMDTS 23003](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/Shell%20spec%20MMDTS23003%20rev%2000\(1\).pdf)

**Disclaimer**: The above documents are not specification, these are turnkey contract documents have been shifted from section [Mechnical Design Specification](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/view_section.jsp?lang=0&id=0,295,852) on MCF website.
